title: Games Done Quick cancels SNK sponsorship during live broadcast due to its ties to Saudi Arabia
summary: The charity organization backtracked after fan complaints about human rights and raised $2.4 million at the event.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced does not work offline and Ubisoft removes controversial statement about microtransactions
summary: The re-release prevents playing without Ubisoft Connect despite what was promised, while the company removes from its annual report that microtransactions make games "more fun".

title: Square Enix announces Octopath Traveler 1 and 2 for Switch 2 but draws criticism over upgrade cost
summary: Players and press criticize having to pay the full price of the game to access visual and performance improvements on Nintendo's new console.

title: Palworld dominates on Steam with the launch of version 1.0 and reaches its second highest peak of players
summary: Pocketpair's survival game had a record weekend with nearly 900,000 concurrent players, displacing Dota 2 on the charts.

title: Call of Duty Black Ops 1 and 2 ports for PlayStation criticized for offering minimal improvements at a high price
summary: Digital Foundry and specialized press call the ports disappointing and expensive, although they top sales charts on PlayStation.

title: UK and Netherlands consumer groups criticize PlayStation's removal of physical discs
summary: The ERA and a Dutch class action argue that Sony's measure eliminates user freedom of choice over their games.

title: EA Sports removes controversial microtransactions from College Football 27 after massive criticism
summary: The company backtracked and withdrew the controversial microtransaction system from the college football game.

title: The Outer Worlds 2 director denies misinformation about Xbox cuts and reaffirms Obsidian's DNA
summary: Brandon Adler insists that the studio retains its essence from New Mexico and KOTOR 2, and asks not to spread false information about the impact of layoffs.

title: Actor Sam Neill dies at 78, famous for Jurassic Park and Event Horizon
summary: The film and video game industry bids farewell to the New Zealand actor, whose legacy in science fiction is widely celebrated by critics and the public.

title: Steam revenue reaches historical record of $11.1 billion in the first half of 2026
summary: Despite player trends toward older titles, high prices drive the most lucrative half-year for Valve's platform.

title: Warframe creative director calls end of Destiny 2 tragic and blames industry executives
summary: Rebif laments that the business aspect always prevails over the hard work of developers, posing an "existential threat" to the medium.

title: Kingdom Hearts will have a special 'Deep Dive' event at Disney's D23 2026
summary: Fans of the saga are on high alert following confirmation of a Disney panel about the future of Square Enix's role-playing franchise.

title: ZeniMax assures that Xbox cuts do not mean the end of The Elder Scrolls Online
summary: Developers try to calm players by stating that the current team size is the same as when they created popular past expansions.

title: Capcom seeks to regain Dragon's Dogma fans' trust with a new DLC in the style of Dark Arisen
summary: After the departure of its original director, developers confirm major new features including a twist on the controversial fast travel system.

title: Persona 3 celebrates its 20th anniversary with a remixed music video and character rankings
summary: The media and community take advantage of the anniversary to analyze the legacy of the acclaimed JRPG and debate its iconic protagonists.

title: Lego set of Donkey Kong arcade machine leaks with a $200 price
summary: Nintendo and Lego expand their collaboration with a new building set based on the classic 80s game before its official reveal.

title: Konami will add Super Bomberman: Panic Bomber W mode as a free update in August
summary: The Super Bomberman collection will receive a new classic game mode in a free update next month.

title: A new game positions itself as the spiritual successor to Bully and already has a release date
summary: While Rockstar confirms it won't make a sequel, another studio is preparing an open world set in high school with a similar tone and gameplay.

title: Bethesda employees and former MindsEye developers protest layoffs and cuts in the industry
summary: Workers organize protests on the streets and outside offices, denouncing working conditions and the treatment by large corporations.

title: Pokémon Winds and Waves leak promises radical changes to the battle system
summary: While fans speculate about the new mechanics, the rediscovery of Mega Gengar's feet generates funny reactions in the community.
